nasb.text: Behold, the Lord has a strong and mighty agent; As a storm of hail, a tempest of destruction, Like a storm of mighty overflowing waters, He has cast it down to the earth with His hand.

esv.text: Behold, the Lord has one who is mighty and strong; like a storm of hail, a destroying tempest, like a storm of mighty, overflowing waters, he casts down to the earth with his hand.

cnv.text: 看哪！主有一個大能大力的人， 像一陣冰雹、一陣毀滅的暴風， 像漲溢猛流的大水， 他必用手把它摔落地上。

ccb.text: 看啊，主已经派来一位强壮有力的人， 他像冰雹和毁灭的暴风， 又像汹涌泛滥的洪水， 他必把那华冠猛力摔在地上。

csbs.text: 看哪！主有一位大能大力者， 如冰雹暴雨，如毁灭的狂风， 又如汹涌冲击的雨水； 他必亲手把它摔落在地。
